channel.title: Relaxing on Cheng Music
channel.description: Recent content in Relaxing on Cheng Music

item.title: Roll With It
item.description: About the game The theme of this Jam is Roll Of The Dice. Our team made a game that consisted of 6 mini-games. Each time the dice is rolled, the player is switched to a different game. Well, there are: Serve: Serve the right food to the right customer, but do it quickly or they will get angry! Avoid: The objective is simple - avoid the bullets! Jump: Jump over the obstacles, and try not to die Count: Match the number on the screen with the amount of dots on the dice before the time runs out!
